title: Chinese Buddhist: Mohe Zhiguan (Great Calming and Contemplation) (2)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Mohe Zhiguan (Great Calming and Contemplation)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Mohe Zhiguan (Great Calming and Contemplation)

translation.text: From Mohe Zhiguan (Great Calming and Contemplation): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
